message:
Centralize provider diagnostic formatting

Make providers emit provider-neutral diagnostic details and let the
runtime format provider labels when surfacing errors.

This removes hard-coded provider names from provider implementations,
centralizes research terminal error formatting, and adds focused tests
for the new diagnostic composition behavior.

files.patch:
@@ -144,7 +144,7 @@ describe("web_search renderer", () => {
     const summary = renderComponentText(
       __test__.renderCollapsedSearchSummary(
         {} as never,
-        '## Query 1: "exa sdk"

1. [Exa SDK](<https://exa.ai/sdk>)

## Query 2: "exa pricing"

Search failed: rate limited',
+        '## Query 1: "exa sdk"

1. [Exa SDK](<https://exa.ai/sdk>)

## Query 2: "exa pricing"

Search failed: Exa: rate limited.',
         createTheme(),
       ),
       120,
